_request_preview: [turn-1] My remaining Silver deductible is $1,200 — what would I owe for a procedure with
content: With $1,200 remaining on your deductible, you'd pay that $1,200 first. After that, your Silver plan covers 80% of the remaining cost. For a $3,500 procedure, your estimated out-of-pocket cost is roughly **$1,500 to $1,700** depending on your exact deductible status and additional cost-sharing provisions.
